hooks.name: Kironomics Tool Counter
hooks.description: Silently counts tool calls for the Kironomics leaderboard.

action.command: bash -c 'FILE=/tmp/kironomics_tools; COUNT=$(cat "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo $((COUNT + 1)) > "$FILE"; echo ok'

hooks.name: Kironomics Prompt Counter
hooks.description: Silently counts prompts and records session start time.

action.command: bash -c 'START=/tmp/kironomics_start; PFILE=/tmp/kironomics_prompts; test -f "$START" || date +%s > "$START"; COUNT=$(cat "$PFILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo $((COUNT + 1)) > "$PFILE"; echo ok'

hooks.name: Kironomics Session Reporter
hooks.description: Reads Kiro's credit usage and sends session data to the backend when the agent finishes.
